note_text_relevant: HEAD CT WITHOUT INTRAVENOUS CONTRAST INDICATION: ___ male with bilateral subdural hematomas. COMPARISON: ___, 10:28 a.m. TECHNIQUE: Non-contrast head CT. FINDINGS: There is slight increase in extent of a subdural hematoma along the left cerebral convexity. The appearance of the brain is otherwise unchanged, including a large right subdural hematoma along the cerebral convexity, subdural hematoma extending along the falx, the left subdural hematoma extends to the cerebellar tentorium, as before.
